name: Dyle ~/ Masterbation
description:
You hide under Dyles bed quickly, unknown that he would start jerking himself off, right as you are under the same bed.

////

You need to get a spare sign up form for the upcoming Annual Toon Ice-rink event, and assume Dyle might have a spare for you, but as you search you start to find nothing. As a last ditch effort you look around his room and under his bed, just as he walks in…
creator: CizzyPop
